properties.name: Build global brand awareness
properties.definition: Move Aurelune from prestige-niche to prestige-known among the global skincare-investor audience, with disproportionate share-of-voice on the AM/PM rhythm story.

properties.name: Establish science authority
properties.definition: Be the prestige brand most associated with chronobiology and circadian-rhythm formulation in the press, professional channels, and AI answer engines.

properties.name: Grow UK D2C revenue
properties.definition: Grow aurelune.com revenue from UK customers by 35% YoY (2025 vs 2024), driven by acquisition + repeat.

properties.name: Accelerate US new-customer acquisition
properties.definition: Acquire 60,000 new customers in the US in 2025 (vs ~38,000 in 2024) — Sephora launch + paid social heavy.

properties.name: Expand US prestige retail footprint
properties.definition: Launch in 240 Sephora US doors by end-2025. Hit $4.5M Sephora sell-through in Year 1.

properties.name: Rebuild DE awareness post-2024 dip
properties.definition: Lift aided brand awareness in DE from 4% to 9% among the millennial-investor cohort by end-2025, after a slower start than UK/US.

properties.name: Lead with ritual story in FR
properties.definition: Position Aurelune in the French market through the ritual lens rather than the clinical lens. Earn editorial coverage in Vogue France, Madame Figaro, AD Magazine.

properties.name: Successful Japan launch
properties.definition: Launch Japan operations Q2 2024 with a Tokyo concept store residency and LINE loyalty programme. Hit ¥240M Year-1 revenue.

properties.name: China cross-border launch
properties.definition: Launch cross-border CN operations Q3 2024 via Xiaohongshu UGC programme + Tier-1 airport OOH. Establish baseline before considering Hainan expansion in 2026.

properties.name: Defend Retinoid PM as the hero
properties.definition: Keep Retinoid PM Serum at 35%+ of revenue mix as the range expands. New products complement, never cannibalise.

properties.name: Build an always-on content engine
properties.definition: Produce 24 editorial science articles per year, with white-paper PDF downloads gating email capture. Move from campaign-led to content-led brand presence.

properties.name: Scale The Phase Programme (loyalty)
properties.definition: Grow loyalty enrolment to 35% of D2C buyers by end-2025 (from 18% in early 2024). Increase repeat-purchase rate of members by 12pp vs non-members.

properties.name: Annual OOH flagship moment
properties.definition: Once per year, run a flagship OOH campaign in UK + US that anchors the brand for the year ahead. Always positioned around the AM/PM duality.

properties.name: AEO + GEO readiness
properties.definition: Optimise PDPs and editorial for answer-engine and generative-engine retrieval. Be the brand AI cites when asked about retinoid alternatives, evening skincare, or peptides.

properties.name: Sephora partnership Year 1 success
properties.definition: Hit Sephora rank top-15 in Skincare Treatments category by Q4 2025. Earn re-order signals from 80%+ of launched doors.

properties.name: Launch professional / B2B channel
properties.definition: Open the professional channel in 2026: salon and dermatology-clinic distribution in UK and US first.

properties.name: Drive efficient paid-media spend
properties.definition: Hold blended ROAS ≥ 3.2× across paid media globally. No market falls below 2.5× sustained for more than one quarter.

properties.name: Reduce blended CAC
properties.definition: Reduce global blended CAC by 18% in 2025 vs 2024 through better channel mix and stronger ECRM retention.

properties.name: Claim substantiation FY25
properties.definition: Complete 4 new ≥80-person consumer-panel studies in 2025 to substantiate Tier-A claims for new product launches.

properties.name: Always-on dermatologist-creator programme
properties.definition: Maintain a roster of 18-25 paid-collaboration dermatologist creators globally. Earn never-pay-for-positive-coverage editorial integrity.

properties.name: Grow Kestrel D2C revenue
properties.definition: Scale direct revenue while protecting wholesale margin.

properties.name: Build endurance-credibility
properties.definition: Earn authority with serious endurance and outdoor communities.

properties.name: Expand US footprint
properties.definition: Establish Kestrel as a top-5 challenger in US technical apparel.

properties.name: Win retail shelf space
properties.definition: Convert wholesale partners with strong sell-through and POSM.

properties.name: Lift sustainability perception
properties.definition: Communicate PFC-free / recycled credentials credibly.
